title: AI PCB Defect Detection
description: Computer vision system using SSIM-based anomaly detection and ResNet-50 for automated PCB defect classification across 6 defect types.
longDescription:
End-to-end AI system for detecting and classifying defects on printed circuit boards.

• Two-stage pipeline — SSIM-based anomaly detection followed by ResNet-50 classification
• Perceptual hashing for golden-reference template matching
• Non-Maximum Suppression for localization
• 6 defect types — missing hole, mouse bite, open circuit, short, spur, spurious copper
• Streamlit UI for interactive analysis
• FastAPI backend for API access
• Dockerized deployment with four-job GitHub Actions CI

title: Student Depression Risk Predictor
description: PyTorch neural network with a logistic regression baseline for student mental health prediction. Accuracy 85%, F1 0.87, ROC-AUC 0.92.
longDescription:
A machine learning system that predicts depression risk in students from 10 lifestyle inputs.

• PyTorch neural network as the primary model
• Logistic regression baseline for comparison
• Trained on a ~28,000-row Kaggle dataset
• Accuracy 85%, F1 0.87, ROC-AUC 0.92
• Desktop GUI (customtkinter) showing probability, risk level, and advice
• FastAPI REST service deployed via Docker
• SQLite for prediction history persistence

title: Seelenruh
description: Multi-persona Generative AI assistant routing across 4 life-aid domains — mental health, legal rights, government schemes, personal safety — on Groq LLaMA-3 with FAISS RAG and EN/HI/DE multilingual answers.
longDescription:
A multi-persona GenAI assistant that routes user questions across four life-aid domains and answers in three languages.

• 4-domain LLM routing — mental health, legal rights, government schemes, personal safety
• LangGraph-driven intent classification before retrieval
• Groq LLaMA-3 inference
• FAISS-backed RAG with Sentence-Transformer embeddings and a cross-encoder reranker
• Curated 100+ source knowledge base with citation grounding
• Multilingual EN/HI/DE responses
• FastAPI backend + React frontend
• MongoDB Atlas, JWT auth, SSE-streamed responses
• Dockerized deployment on Hugging Face Spaces
highlights: 4-domain LLM routing (mental health, legal, schemes, safety)
EN/HI/DE multilingual, JWT auth, SSE streaming

title: RouteLM
description: LLM course tutor with pre-retrieval query classification — routes between RAG, LLM-only, and refusal with sub-500ms off-topic refusals.
longDescription:
An LLM course assistant that routes a question through a three-path classifier before retrieval runs — RAG (grounded), LLM-only (general), or refusal (off-topic).

• Per-course thresholds with max-anchor scoring instead of centroid averaging
• 18/18 hand-picked queries correctly classified
• On-topic latency ~1.1s, off-topic refusals under 500ms
• 36 backend + 7 frontend tests
• LangGraph orchestration, FAISS retrieval, Groq inference, Ollama bge-m3 embeddings
• Circuit breaker, WebSocket/SSE streaming, SQLite auth
• FastAPI backend + React frontend

title: NexusMeet
description: Encrypted real-time communication platform with WebRTC, mediasoup SFU routing, AES-GCM end-to-end chat, and automatic P2P fallback.
longDescription:
An encrypted real-time communication platform built on WebRTC, mediasoup SFU routing, and browser-based AES-GCM end-to-end encryption.

• AES-GCM end-to-end chat via Web Crypto API — chat key in URL hash, server only sees ciphertext
• mediasoup-based SFU for scalable group calls
• Automatic P2P fallback when SFU is unavailable
• Waiting room with host approval
• Screen sharing
• Host promotion when organizer leaves
• ~24-hour ephemeral room persistence
• React 18 + Node/Express + MongoDB + Socket.io + Material-UI
• Backend, frontend, and Playwright E2E tests

title: GitlessForge
description: Distributed version control system built from scratch — snapshots, branches, merges, diff, blame, stash, reflog — wrapped with a GitHub-style platform (PRs, code review, CI, Kanban).
longDescription:
A from-scratch distributed version control system — not a Git wrapper, not a libgit2 binding.

• File snapshots, branches, merges, diff, blame, stash, reflog — all implemented from scratch
• GitHub-style platform on top — pull requests, code review, merge workflows
• Static analysis flags hardcoded secrets and unsafe functions in PRs
• CI/CD pipelines with multi-stage steps and logging
• Drag-and-drop Kanban project boards
• Auth, rate limiting, API keys
• Node + Express + MongoDB backend
• React + Vite frontend
• Jest integration tests, Docker Compose deployment
highlights: Branches, merges, diff, blame, stash, reflog
PRs + code review + CI + static analysis
